basic_details.job_title: Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Record Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore
basic_details.short_information: Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Record Clerk Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Coimbatore District. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 on a full-time basis under Advertisement No. 01/2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 35 Years Age Relaxation: General: 30 Years BC/BCM/MBC/DC: 32 Years SC/ST: 35 Years Age as on 01-07-2026

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Basic Computer Knowledge, Tamil and English writing/reading skills.
qualification.details: Registration Clerk: 10th Pass Basic Computer Knowledge Ability to read and write Tamil and English

selection_process: Written Test (Reading and Writing Skills) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Record Clerk Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://coimbatore.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Registration Clerk Job 2026 Notification P

all_official_links.label: Download Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore Registration Clerk Job 2026 Notification P

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Record Clerk post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Record Clerk post is 09-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Record Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years. The maximum age limit is 30 years for General candidates, 32 years for BC/BCM/MBC/DC candidates, and 35 years for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Record Clerk position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard, possess basic computer knowledge, and have the ability to read and write in Tamil and English.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Record Clerk post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Record Clerk post will receive a salary in the range of ₹.15900 to ₹.58500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to send the filled application form along with required documents to the Deputy Director, Survey and Settlement Records Department, Zonal Office, Coimbatore.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Record Clerk post in the Department of Land Survey and Records Coimbatore.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Record Clerk role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test focusing on reading and writing skills, followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding this recruitment and other updates is http://coimbatore.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. When did the application process start?
faq.answer: The application process for the Record Clerk recruitment started on 17-06-2026.
